title: turbinicarpus × albellus
intro: Turbinicarpus × albellus is a hybrid cactus species, resulting from the cross between Turbinicarpus lophirhortus and a plant of the genus Mammillaria. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Turbinicarpus × albellus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from various types of pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its flowers in water or oil, but more research is needed to fully understand its applications and effects.
